userStories.title: Create Grok API client in shared utilities
userStories.description: Add execution/grok_image_gen.py that wraps XAI Grok image generation API
acceptanceCriteria: File execution/grok_image_gen.py created
GrokImageGenerator class with generate_image() method
Reads XAI_API_KEY from .env
Returns list of image paths or raises error
Has basic error handling for API failures
Docstrings explain usage

userStories.title: Update content generator to support image generation flag
userStories.description: Modify business_content_generator.py to flag posts for image generation
acceptanceCriteria: generate_post() method has generate_image parameter (default False)
Post object has image_prompt field (None if no image needed)
Template types have associated image prompt styles
No actual image generation yet (just flagging)
Existing functionality unaffected

userStories.title: Integrate Grok generation into scheduler
userStories.description: Update business_scheduler.py to generate images for flagged posts
acceptanceCriteria: When scheduling posts, check if generate_image=True
Call Grok API to generate image using post's image_prompt
Save images to output/images/ with timestamp naming
Update post's media_paths field with image path
50% of posts get images (every other post)
Error handling if Grok API fails (skip image, don't crash)

userStories.title: Update X scheduler to attach images to tweets
userStories.description: Modify x_scheduler.py to upload and attach images when posting
acceptanceCriteria: Check if post has media_paths before posting
Upload images to X using media upload API
Attach media_ids to tweet
Post with image successfully
Verified manually with test post (screenshot proof)
